query: I just fixed the auto-advance timer in VocabQuiz.razor — can you verify it actually works by running the quiz and checking that it moves to the next word after 2 seconds?
the audio button on the vocabulary detail page isn't playing anything on the webapp. test it end to end and figure out what's broken
I changed the dashboard to show Learning count but it still shows 0 after I do quizzes. verify the cache invalidation is working by answering some quiz questions and checking the dashboard
run a quick smoke test on the app after my last commit — make sure the basic flows still work
I added a new Generate from Transcript button on the resource edit page. test that it actually generates vocabulary words when I click it — use Gunther's German transcript
can you verify that the import workflow works? paste this youtube URL, fetch the transcript, polish it, save it, then generate vocabulary from it

I fixed the UserId bug in Cloze.razor — it was hardcoded to '1' instead of the GUID. verify the fix by doing some cloze exercises and checking that the VocabularyProgress records have the right user ID
test the skill profile CRUD — create a new skill, edit it, verify it shows up in the list, then delete it
after my refactor of the settings page, make sure theme switching and quiz preferences still save correctly
verify that the minimal pairs session records attempts correctly to the database after I changed the scoring logic
add a speaker button next to the target language term input on the vocabulary edit page
refactor the VocabularyProgressService to use batch SQL updates instead of individual saves
the IsLatinScriptLanguage method doesn't handle language names with parenthetical suffixes like 'German (auto-generated)'. Fix the normalization logic
create a new Blazor component for displaying vocabulary flashcards with flip animation
add ElevenLabs TTS integration to the shadowing page so it can generate audio for each sentence
update the AGENTS.md to document the new database migration process we agreed on
I need to increase the Polly resilience timeout from 30s to 120s for AI calls — they're timing out on large transcripts
write a new EF Core migration to add a MnemonicImageUri column to the VocabularyWord table
set up the Aspire AppHost to include the Android and iOS projects in the orchestration
I want to change the quiz auto-advance duration default from 2 seconds to 3 seconds in VocabularyQuizPreferences.cs
